name: publish-v0-1-2
title: Publish Cutout v0.1.3 after v0.1.2 gate failure
description: Preserve failed tag v0.1.2, fix post-build macOS DMG notarization, synchronize version 0.1.3, tag, and publish the protected four-platform stable GitHub Release.
creator: tseka
notes: v0.1.2 remains an unpublished immutable failure tag. v0.1.3 workflow 29893926338 succeeded and published the latest stable Release at https://github.com/Nebutra/cutout/releases/tag/v0.1.3.
